title: Develop and implement family business structures and relationships
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and implement family business structures and relationships demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and establish an appropriate rural family business structure

pcs.text: Establish the goals for the business and the goals of the individual family stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish the goals for the business and the goals of the individual family stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the goals for the business and the goals of the individual family stakeholders.

pcs.text: Identify options for the business structure which best fit the business and family stakeholder goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify options for the business structure which best fit the business and family stakeholder goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify options for the business structure which best fit the business and family stakeholder goals.

pcs.text: Assess legal and taxation implications of each option
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess legal and taxation implications of each option?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess legal and taxation implications of each option.

pcs.text: Assess the advantages and disadvantages of each option for this business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the advantages and disadvantages of each option for this business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the advantages and disadvantages of each option for this business.

pcs.text: Establish an appropriate business organisational structure in consultation with members of the business unit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish an appropriate business organisational structure in consultation with members of the business unit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish an appropriate business organisational structure in consultation with members of the business unit.

pcs.text: Establish administrative procedures to ensure full compliance within the chosen structure.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish administrative procedures to ensure full compliance within the chosen structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish administrative procedures to ensure full compliance within the chosen structure.

pcs.text: Prepare a succession plan for the business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a succession plan for the business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a succession plan for the business.
